debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Field K
inst✝ : ValuativeRel K
x : K
⊢ (valuation K) x = 1 ↔ ∃ r, x = ↑↑r

proof:
by
  constructor
  · intro hv
    have hne : x ≠ 0 := fun h0 => by simp only [h0, map_zero] at hv; exact zero_ne_one hv
    have hx_mem : x ∈ 𝒪[K] := hv.le
    have hinv_val : (valuation K) x⁻¹ ≤ 1 := by rw [map_inv₀, hv, inv_one]
    exact ⟨⟨⟨x, hx_mem⟩, ⟨x⁻¹, hinv_val⟩, Subtype.ext (mul_inv_cancel₀ hne),
           Subtype.ext (inv_mul_cancel₀ hne)⟩, rfl⟩
  · rintro ⟨r, rfl⟩
    have h1 : (valuation K) (r : K) ≤ 1 := r.val.2
    have mul_eq : (r : K) * ((r⁻¹ : 𝒪[K]ˣ) : K) = 1 := by exact_mod_cast Units.mul_inv r
    have inv_eq : ((r⁻¹ : 𝒪[K]ˣ) : K) = (r : K)⁻¹ := eq_inv_of_mul_eq_one_right mul_eq
    have h2 : (valuation K) ((r⁻¹ : 𝒪[K]ˣ) : K) ≤ 1 := (r⁻¹).val.2
    rw [inv_eq, map_inv₀] at h2
    have hne : (r : K) ≠ 0 := by intro hz; exact Units.ne_zero r (Subtype.ext hz)
    have hpos : 0 < (valuation K) (r : K) := by
      rw [zero_lt_iff]
      intro h
      exact hne ((valuation K).zero_iff.mp h)
    exact le_antisymm h1 ((inv_le_one₀ hpos).mp h2)
